zh.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh.Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Régi: 法國瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy於1215年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾時，他的父親Raoul de Nesle34歲，母親Adèle de Roye31歲。他和Marguerite De Montfort至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1292年2月2日享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy于1215年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾时，他的父亲Raoul de Nesle34岁，母亲Adèle de Roye31岁。他和Marguerite De Montfort至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1292年2月2日享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nesle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nestel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Wolfram.  Jewish Aron, Hyman.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a ribbon and cord maker, from Middle High German nestel ‘(shoe)lace, drawstring, cord’.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy was born in 1215, in Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Raoul de Nesle, was 34 and his mother, Adèle de Roye, was 31. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Marguerite De Montfort. He died on 2 February 1292, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy est né en 1215, à Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Raoul de Nesle, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Roye, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Marguerite De Montfort. Il est décédé le 2 février 1292, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy 1215 in Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul de Nesle 34 und seine Mutter Adèle de Roye 31. Er hatte mit Marguerite De Montfort mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Februar 1292 im Alter von 77 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy è nato il nel 1215 nel Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul de Nesle, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Adèle de Roye, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Marguerite De Montfort. Morì il 2 febbraio 1292, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvyが1215年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンダンマルティン-エン-ゴeルで生まれた時，父Raoul de Nesleは34歳，母Adèle de Royeは31歳であった。彼はMarguerite De Montfortとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1292年2月2日に77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy(이)가 1215년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 다마틴--고e일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul de Nesle(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle de Roye(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Marguerite De Montfort(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 2월 2일 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy nasceu em 1215, em Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Raoul de Nesle, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Roye, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Marguerite De Montfort. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1292, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy родился в 1215 г. в местности даммартин-ен-гоeл, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul de Nesle было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Roye, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Marguerite De Montfort. Он умер 2 февраля 1292 г. в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Nesle III   Lord of Falvy nació en 1215, en Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Raoul de Nesle, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Adèle de Roye, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Marguerite De Montfort. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1292, a la edad de 77 años.
